name: mes-prieres-pwa-prototype
description: Prototype PWA hors ligne d’un livre de prières personnel.

scripts.test: node tests/sw_contract.mjs && python3 tests/integrity_guards.py && python3 tests/e2e.py
scripts.verify: python3 tools/generate_corpus_js.py && python3 tools/generate_help_js.py && python3 tools/generate_sw.py --check && node tools/audit.mjs && python3 tools/release_audit.py --prepackage && node tests/sw_contract.mjs && python3 tests/integrity_guards.py && python3 tests/e2e.py
scripts.verify:ci: python3 tools/generate_corpus_js.py --check && python3 tools/generate_help_js.py --check && python3 tools/generate_sw.py --check && node tools/audit.mjs && python3 tools/release_audit.py --prepackage && node tests/sw_contract.mjs && python3 tests/integrity_guards.py && python3 tests/e2e.py
scripts.github:verify: npm run verify:ci && npm run pages:prepare && npm run pages:verify && python3 tools/github_package_audit.py --site site && python3 tools/report_line_evidence.py
